message:
fix: audit-driven fixes across security, reliability, and correctness

- Strengthen resolveSafeChildPath with path.relative() instead of string
  prefix matching to properly reject traversal attempts
- Fix service worker memory leak: clean up previous statechange handler
  before attaching new one when updatefound fires multiple times
- Validate roadmap API query params at runtime instead of unsafe `as` casts
  (status and sortBy now filtered against allowed values)
- Add try-catch to status API route to prevent unhandled exceptions
- Remove stale DEFAULT_CONFIG module-level singleton (was created at import
  time, wouldn't reflect JFP_HOME changes)
- Fix AnimatedSection: use React.Children.map with child keys instead of
  bare index keys in dynamic lists
- Fix CommunityPromptCard hydration mismatch: render absolute date during
  SSR, switch to relative time after mount
- Clear SpotlightSearch rerank timeout on resolution to prevent leak
- Fix semantic rerank fallback: normalize BM25 score when embedding fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
